_meta.description: Tax parameters for the GIFT IFSC saving estimator. All values INDICATIVE and must be verified against the latest Finance Act and IFSCA circulars.

section_80la.label: Section 80LA deduction
section_80la.notes: 100% deduction on eligible income for any 10 consecutive years chosen within a block period. Budget 2026 indicated the block window can extend up to 25 years. A concessional rate (~15%) is referenced for income outside the holiday. VERIFY against the latest Finance Act.
section_80la.source: Income-tax Act, 1961 — Section 80LA; Finance Act (verify current year)

advanced_defaults._note: Surcharge applies on tax; cess applies on tax+surcharge. MAT (minimum alternate tax) on book profits can apply during the holiday even with the 100% deduction, so 'apply_mat' lifts IFSC holiday tax from zero to the MAT charge. All values INDICATIVE — verify against the latest Finance Act.
advanced_defaults.source: Income-tax Act, 1961 — MAT (s.115JB) and surcharge/cess schedules; verify current rates
